title: Bill for the Political Parties Amendment Act No. of 2025
text:
REPUBLIC OF VANUATU
BILL FOR THE
POLITICAL PARTIES REGISTRATION (AMENDMENT)
ACT NO. OF 2025
Explanatory Note
The Political Party Registration Act No. 15 of 2023(“the Act”) requires specific amendments
to support the regulation of political party registration and management. The proposed
amendments to the Act will provide more clarity in the legislation and assist the Political
Party Registrar and the Screening Committee in undertaking their duties and responsibilities
more effectively.
This Bill amends the Political Party Registration Act No 15 of 2023 by:
1. defining the responsibilities of the Principal Electoral Officer as the Chairperson of
the Screening Committee, and further provides the quorum and voting requirements
for committee meetings; and
2. establishing clear boundaries in which Custom Movements can contest elections
based on the cultural origins they represent by amending subsection 7(3) to replace
“Island” with “constituency”; and
3. amending the de-registration process for political parties in subsection 13(3) so that
the requirement of second notice does not apply to political party which is to be
deregistered based failing to meet the minimum threshold for voter support at a
previous election.
Minister of Internal Affairs
REPUBLIC OF VANUATU
BILL FOR THE
POLITICAL PARTIES REGISTRATION
(AMENDMENT)
ACT NO. OF 2025
Arrangement of Sections
1 Amendment ................................................................................................ 2
2 Commencement .......................................................................................... 2
Bill for the Political Parties Registration (Amendment) Act No. of 2025 1
REPUBLIC OF VANUATU
BILL FOR THE
POLITICAL PARTIES REGISTRATION
(AMENDMENT)
ACT NO. OF 2025
An Act to amend the Political Parties Registration Act No. 15 of 2023.
Be it enacted by the President and Parliament as follows-
1 Amendment
The Political Parties Registration Act No. 15 of 2023 is amended as set out in the
Schedule.
2 Commencement
This Act commences on the day on which it is published in the Gazette.
Bill for the Political Parties Registration (Amendment) Act No. of 2025 2
SCHEDULE
AMENDMENTS OF THE POLITICAL PARTIES REGISTRATION ACT NO. 15 OF 2023
SCHEDULE
AMENDMENTS OF THE POLITICAL PARTIES
REGISTRATION ACT NO. 15 OF 2023
1 Subsection 7(3)
Delete “island”, substitute “constituency”
2 Paragraph 8A(2)(a)
After “Officer”, insert “, who is the Chairperson”
3 Subsection 8A(3)
Repeal the subsection, substitute
“(3) The Principal Electoral Officer is to preside at all meetings of the
Screening Committee.
(4) At the meeting of the Screening Committee, a quorum consists of 2
members of the Screening Committee, of whom one must be the Principal
Electoral Officer.
(5) The decisions of the Screening Committee are to be made by a simple
majority vote of the members present and voting.
(6) If there is a tie vote at a meeting of the Screening Committee, the Principal
Electoral Officer has a casting vote.
(7) The Screening Committee may determine and regulate its own
procedures.”
4 Paragraph 12(1)(e)
Delete “Order”, substitute “Regulation”
5 After subsection 13(3)
Insert
“(3A) Subsection (3) does not apply to a political party which is being
deregistered for the purposes of paragraph 12(1)(e).”
Bill for the Political Parties Registration (Amendment) Act No. of 2025 3
authority: Parliament of the Republic of Vanuatu
